methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Growth → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.2x) to $2M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Roboneers operates in the Defense & Security sector at the Growth stage. The comparable universe includes 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms, with top-tier peers including Anduril Industries, Scale AI, and Shield AI. However, a narrow peer-median approach is not applicable here: while 21 same-sector peers exist, filtering for identical stage, proximity, and valuation tier yielded fewer than three datapoints, making sector-wide median comparables unreliable.

The Stage-Progression method is applicable and anchors the analysis to Roboneers' $2M total raised. Applying a 1.2x multiplier typical of Growth-stage advancement yields $2.4M. This method reflects the baseline assumption that the company has progressed materially since its initial raise but remains pre-revenue or early-revenue within the frontier defense subsector.

The triangulation analysis, constrained to a single applicable method, supports a valuation range of $2.04M (low) to $2.76M (high), with a median of $2.4M. Key uncertainties center on the lack of comparable transaction data at Roboneers' specific stage and technical risk profile within Defense & Security, and the absence of disclosed revenue or customer traction. A more precise range would require either late-stage peer transaction data or disclosed operational metrics from Roboneers.
